display.purpose: Hero H1 only, one use per page.

title.purpose: Service row names, contact column titles.

body.purpose: Paragraph copy, light weight only, max ~65ch.

label.purpose: Nav, eyebrows, stat labels, tags — uppercase tracked, the system's only small-text register.

shadows.name: ambient-low
shadows.purpose: Reserved for genuinely floating UI (modal, dropdown, popover) — not used at rest anywhere on the page today.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for blur-in reveals and scroll reveals.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single solid-fill action per screen — reserved for the phone call CTA.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-block; background: #C4975A; color: #05090F; padding: 1rem 2.25rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.09em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 0; transition: background 0.22s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover, .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { background: #DDB070; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FAFAF8; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action on dark surfaces, always paired beside the primary gold button.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-block; background: transparent; color: rgba(250,250,248,0.68); padding: 1rem 2.25rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.09em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; border: 1px solid rgba(250,250,248,0.2); border-radius: 0; transition: border-color 0.22s, color 0.22s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover, .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { border-color: rgba(250,250,248,0.5); color: #FAFAF8; }

components.name: Dark Button
components.description: Action on light sections; inverts to solid ink fill on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-dark { display: inline-block; padding: 0.9375rem 1.875rem; border: 1px solid rgba(10,16,32,0.25); color: #0A1020; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.09em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 0; transition: background 0.22s, color 0.22s, border-color 0.22s; } .ds-btn-dark:hover, .ds-btn-dark:focus-visible { background: #0A1020; color: #FAFAF8; border-color: #0A1020; }

components.name: Service Row
components.description: Borderless list row (not a card) — name slides right and turns gold on hover.
components.html:
Occhiali da Vista
Ampia scelta di montature per ogni stile e correzione.
Esame visivo
components.css: .ds-svc-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 4fr 6fr auto; align-items: start; gap: 3rem; padding: 2.75rem 0; border-top: 1px solid rgba(196,151,90,0.14); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(196,151,90,0.11); } .ds-svc-row__name { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(1.75rem, 2.6vw, 2.625rem); font-weight: 500; color: #FAFAF8; line-height: 1.1; transition: transform 0.38s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94), color 0.38s; } .ds-svc-row:hover .ds-svc-row__name { transform: translateX(10px); color: #C4975A; } .ds-svc-row__desc { font-size: 0.9rem; color: rgba(250,250,248,0.5); line-height: 1.74; font-weight: 300; } .ds-svc-row__tag { font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 0.13em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #C4975A; border: 1px solid rgba(196,151,90,0.28); padding: 0.375rem 0.875rem; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Stat Block
components.description: One column of the three-up stat band — serif gold numeral over tracked label.
components.css: .ds-stat { padding: 3rem 2rem; text-align: center; border-right: 1px solid rgba(196,151,90,0.1); background: #101926; } .ds-stat__num { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(3rem, 5vw, 4.5rem); font-weight: 600; color: #C4975A; line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .ds-stat__lbl { font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(250,250,248,0.4); font-weight: 300; }

narrative.overview:
The page reads like late-afternoon light through a shop window that's held the same family name for 35 years: near-black navy as the room in shadow, warm gold as the one shaft of light picking out the frames worth noticing. Every section is a deeper or lighter shade of that same navy — the palette never leaves its own family — with gold used sparingly enough that it stays precious. Serif italics (Cormorant Garamond) carry the human, spoken parts — quotes, reviews, the name "Giuliano" — while DM Sans carries the functional parts: labels, hours, phone numbers. That contrast is the whole personality: warm heritage story told through cold, precise structure.

This explicitly rejects the generic optical-chain look — no clinical white-and-blue, no stock-photo confidence, no rounded "friendly SaaS" softness. Nothing here should look like a website builder produced it. The luxury is quiet: hairline borders, small caps, one accent color, never a gradient, never a card shadow doing the trust-building for you.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black navy stacked in four tones, never leaving its own hue family
One gold accent, used on ≤10% of any surface — text, hairlines, one button
Serif italic for anything spoken or quoted; uppercase tracked sans for anything functional
Zero border-radius anywhere — every edge is a sharp, deliberate line
Flat by default; shadows are earned, not decorative

rules.name: The One Flame Rule
rules.body: Gold never fills a surface larger than a button. It marks — a border, a word, a digit, an icon — it never floods.

rules.name: The Same-Hue Rule
rules.body: Every dark surface shares one hue family, differing only in lightness. Never introduce a second dark hue to distinguish sections.

rules.name: The Whisper-or-Shout Rule
rules.body: Type is either large and serif, or small, tracked, and uppercase. No mid-size, mid-weight, sentence-case default paragraph style beyond body.

rules.name: The Hairline-First Rule
rules.body: Before reaching for a shadow, ask whether a 1px gold-dim border or a one-step navy tonal shift already does the job. Shadows are reserved for things that genuinely float.

rules.name: The Sharp Corner Rule
rules.body: border-radius: 0 on every element, permanently. Sharp corners are load-bearing to the boutique, not app, feel.

dos: Do keep every dark surface within the same navy hue family, differing only in lightness.
Do reserve solid gold fill for exactly one button per screen.
Do pair serif italic against uppercase tracked sans as the system's only two typographic registers.
Do use 1px gold hairline borders as the default way to separate content before reaching for a shadow or a card.
Do keep every corner sharp, permanently.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion for the hero reveal, ghost drift, and marquee scroll.
donts: Don't introduce a second accent color.
Don't use card grids with icon-heading-text repeated identically.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, or side-stripe colored borders.
Don't let the page read as a generic website-builder template.
Don't default to a shadow for depth — try a hairline border or tonal shift first.
